notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien formation movement, shields with destructible pixels, mystery ship, wave progression, and audio; alien sprites are simplistic rectangles rather than iconic pixel art shapes but overall gameplay is complete and functional.
Excellent implementation with destructible shields, progressive difficulty, and solid controls, though visuals use basic shapes instead of classic sprites.

A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone with working waves, shields, bullets, and game states, but it lacks some classic polish and has control/state handling quirks that keep it well short of perfect.
